violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Upper rail to cook line North prep cooler has products temping at 44-46 degrees F. Salad dressing bottles in service alley prep cooler temping at 48-49 degrees F.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not maintained properly. Replace damaged hood filter on cook line.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. Microwaves on cook line have laminate peeling from the interior part of the door.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in drawer coolers and freezers have an accumulation of food debris inside of units and need cleaning.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Area around fryers have an accumulation of grease and need cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors in walk in units and in kitchen need cleaning under shelving units and equipment along wall junctures.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Wall tiles along floor junctures are damaged or missing in multiple areas of the kitchen. Need repair.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
